---
name: find-duplicate-code
description: Identify duplicate code in the codebase and suggest refactoring strategies.
agent: agent
tools: [read]
---


Look through the codebase and identify any duplicate code. Provide a list of the duplicate code snippets along with their locations in the codebase. Suggest refactoring strategies to eliminate the duplicates and improve code maintainability.
Please do not make any changes to the codebase, just provide the analysis and suggestions.
